title: Top 10 Must-Watch Movies of the Year
description: The top 10 movies of 2011 according to IMDb ratings include The Help, Harry Potter and the Deathly Hallows: Part 2, and The Girl with the Dragon Tattoo.

title: Top Headlines of 2011: From Tragedy to Triumph
description: The article lists significant events that occurred in 2011, including the Arizona shooting, the Arab Spring, the Fukushima disaster, the killing of Osama bin Laden, the News of the World phone hacking scandal, the US credit rating downgrade, the capture and killing of Muammar Gaddafi, the death of Kim Jong-il, and the official withdrawal of US troops from Iraq.

title: The King's Speech Dominates 83rd Academy Awards
description: The article lists the winners of the 83rd Academy Awards, including Best Picture for The King's Speech, Best Director for Tom Hooper, Best Actor for Colin Firth, and Best Actress for Natalie Portman. Other categories include Best Supporting Actor and Actress, Best Original and Adapted Screenplay, Best Animated Feature Film, Best Foreign Language Film, and technical categories such as Best Cinematography, Best Visual Effects, and Best Sound Editing.
